findings.description: The date context "(2014/12/16時点)" associated with the JasperReports community edition URL is omitted. This note indicates the version/URL information was verified as of a specific date, which is relevant context given the library is deprecated.

The 構造 h2 section in the source contains three substantial h3 subsections (クラス図, インターフェース定義, クラス定義) with multiple package/class tables. The combined plain text of this section substantially exceeds 2000 characters, but the knowledge file bundles all of it into a single section s3 without splitting. Per the validation rule, an h2 with >= 2000 chars of content and existing h3 sub-headings should be split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 subsections under 構造: クラス図, インターフェース定義 (4 interfaces across 4 packages), クラス定義 (6 packages containing 17+ classes with descriptions)
